title: pilosella glomerata subsp. nigrifontimontana
intro: Pilosella glomerata subsp. nigrifontimontana, also known as the yellow salsify or black-fronted yellow salsify, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pilosella glomerata subsp. nigrifontimontana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
